statement: This is AUDIT-SUPPORT provenance for a prospective prediction lock — NOT an observed outcome and NOT calibration data. The prediction was locked BEFORE the outcome was known; no outcome is recorded here. pending_cases.json remains the source of truth for the pending case; outcomes are recorded later ONLY through the Phase 15L-C gated mapping path. This file is never loaded as a validation case (absent from manifest.json).

cost_summary.note: exactly ONE paid run; spend <= $12 hard cap (cost guard refuses before spend on over-cap)

final_ballot_repair_summary.note: the $10 discussion cap truncated final ballots 2/24; repair restored 24/24; run quality aggregate=1.0/READY

artifact_durability_note: Artifacts are LOCAL/untracked (not git-tracked, not on the production volume). The git-committed cryptographic lock is self-auditing: prediction_hash reproduces from predicted_proportions + brief_hash + snapshot_hash + evidence_snapshot_id + locked_at + report_schema_version + simulation_id_used_in_hash (None). For production durability, point ASSEMBLY_ARTIFACT_ROOT at the Railway durable volume.
outcome_metric: final pledged USD + final backer count at close 2026-06-03 (and whether it clears the ~$150,000 first stretch goal)
scoring_method: partial_buyer_anchor_only (action_anchor_only via the Phase 15L-C gated mapping; does NOT unlock Phase 15E)
